title: garcinia dulcis
intro: Garcinia dulcis is a tropical tree species native to Southeast Asia, also known as the katuk or sweet gourd tree, belonging to the family Clusiaceae. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Garcinia dulcis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Garcinia dulcis is often used in teas, soups, and salads, as well as being used to make traditional medicine capsules and extracts.
